data.title: Bombardier Celebrates Valued Customer Vista’s First Global 8000 Aircraft
data.description: In Montreal on April 15, 2026, Bombardier marked the handover of the first Global 8000 aircraft to Vista, a loyal customer. The delivery took place at Bombardier’s London Biggin Hill Service Centre. This new aircraft will enhance the travel experience for Vista customers, providing them with top-tier business aviation services.

data.title: Nokia and Orange advance AI‑RAN innovation with NVIDIA
data.description: Nokia has partnered with the Orange Group to work on a new collaboration that will focus on the development and evaluation of AI-RAN technology. This partnership aims to combine Nokia's expertise in artificial intelligence with Orange Group's network capabilities. The collaboration will involve investing approximately $10 million in research and development over the next two years. The goal is to enhance network performance and efficiency through the implementation of AI technology in the RAN (Radio Access Network). This collaboration is part of both companies' efforts to innovate and advance in the telecommunications industry.

data.title: Notification of executives and related parties’ transactions with Nilfisk shares
data.description: Nilfisk has been informed of transactions in Nilfisk shares by executives and/or their related parties as required under Article 19 of the EU Market Abuse Regulation no. 596/2014. The notification includes details of transactions involving a specified number of shares in the company.

data.title: Landsbankinn hf.: Offering of covered bonds
data.description: On Thursday, April 16 at 15:00, Landsbankinn will host an auction to sell covered bonds. These bonds, specifically the non-indexed series LBANK CB 29, will be available for purchase during the auction.

data.title: Deutsche Lufthansa AG: Release according to Article 40 (1) of the WpHG (the German Securities Trading Act) with the objective of Europe-wide distribution
data.description: Deutsche Lufthansa AG has issued a release in compliance with Article 40 (1) of the German Securities Trading Act (WpHG) for the purpose of distribution throughout Europe.

data.title: Torani Launches Nationwide Tour in Search of America’s Favorite Flavor
data.description: San Leandro-based Torani, a top flavor company, is embarking on a nationwide journey to discover Americans' preferred flavors and drink concoctions. After the success of their "Flavor Factory" pop-up tour last year, commemorating Torani's 100th anniversary with innovative flavors, they are now focused on gauging the evolving flavor trends in the U.S. Over a century, Torani has blended inventiveness with stringent quality standards.

data.title: Elderly are turning to VR to combat social isolation. Special tools in senior living communities promote shared experiences.
data.description: Innovative tools designed for senior living communities now promote shared experiences and social bonding among residents. These tools are catered specifically for seniors and aim to enhance their quality of life by fostering connections within the community. This initiative reflects a growing trend in the industry to address the social needs of elderly individuals. The tools have been well-received, with a notable increase in social interactions among residents and a significant improvement in their overall well-being. Such advancements are instrumental in creating a more engaging and supportive environment for seniors, with a focus on promoting companionship and connections within the community.
